Title: Successful login with standard_user
Preconditions: User on login page not logged in
Steps: 1. Enter username: standard_user / 2. Enter password: secret_sauce / 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Redirected to /inventory.html - 6 products visible

Title: Locked out user sees correct error
Steps: 1. Enter username: locked_out_user / 2. Enter password: secret_sauce / 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error: Sorry this user has been locked out. User stays on login page

Title: Invalid credentials show error
Steps: 1. Enter username: invalid_user / 2. Enter password: wrongpass / 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error: Username and password do not match. No redirect

Title: Empty username shows validation error
Steps: 1. Leave username empty / 2. Enter any password / 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error: Username is required

Title: Empty password shows validation error
Steps: 1. Enter username: standard_user / 2. Leave password empty / 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error: Password is required

Title: Logout ends session and redirects to login
Steps: 1. Click hamburger menu / 2. Click Logout
Expected Result: Session ends - redirected to login page

Title: Direct URL access without session is blocked
Steps: 1. Navigate directly to /inventory.html
Expected Result: Redirected to login page - inventory not accessible

Title: Inventory displays exactly 6 products
Steps: 1. Observe inventory page
Expected Result: 6 products shown each with image and name and description and price and Add to cart button

Title: Sort by Price low to high
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown / 2. Select Price low to high

Title: Sort by Price high to low
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown / 2. Select Price high to low

Title: Sort by Name Z to A
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown / 2. Select Name Z to A
Expected Result: Products in reverse alphabetical order

Title: Product detail page has all required elements
Steps: 1. Click any product name or image
Expected Result: Detail page shows large image and full name and description and price and Add to cart and Back to products

Title: BUG - problem_user all product images broken
Steps: 1. Observe inventory page
Expected Result: All 6 products show unique correct images - no 404 placeholders

Title: BUG - performance_glitch_user login too slow
Steps: 1. Login as performance_glitch_user / 2. Measure load time
Expected Result: Inventory loads in under 2 seconds

Title: Adding a product updates the cart badge
Steps: 1. Click Add to cart on Sauce Labs Backpack
Expected Result: Button changes to Remove - cart badge shows 1

Title: Adding multiple products reflects correct badge count
Steps: 1. Add Backpack / 2. Add Bike Light / 3. Add Bolt T-Shirt
Expected Result: Cart badge shows 3 - all 3 buttons show Remove

Title: Add product from product detail page
Steps: 1. Click any product to open detail / 2. Click Add to cart
Expected Result: Badge increments by 1 - still on detail page

Title: Removing a product decrements the badge
Steps: 1. Add Backpack and Bike Light / 2. Click Remove on Backpack
Expected Result: Badge shows 1 - Backpack button resets to Add to cart

Title: Cart persists when navigating between pages
Steps: 1. Open product detail / 2. Go back to inventory
Expected Result: Cart badge still shows 2

Title: Cart QTY field is display-only
Steps: 1. Go to cart / 2. Try to edit QTY value
Expected Result: QTY shows 1 and is not an editable input

Title: Continue Shopping returns to inventory with cart intact
Steps: 1. Go to cart / 2. Click Continue Shopping
Expected Result: Redirected to inventory - cart badge preserved

Title: Complete full checkout happy path
Steps: 1. Checkout / 2. Fill John and Doe and 12345 / 3. Continue / 4. Finish
Expected Result: Confirmation page: Thank you for your order

Title: Overview shows correct payment and shipping info
Steps: 1. Proceed to overview step
Expected Result: Payment: SauceCard 31337 - Shipping: Free Pony Express Delivery

Title: Order total calculation is correct
Preconditions: Backpack and Bike Light in cart
Steps: 1. Proceed to overview step
Expected Result: Item total: 39.98 - Tax: 3.20 - Total: 43.18

Title: Empty First Name blocks proceeding
Steps: 1. Fill Last Name and Zip only / 2. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error: First Name is required - stays on step 1

Title: Empty Last Name blocks proceeding
Steps: 1. Fill First Name and Zip only / 2. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error: Last Name is required - stays on step 1

Title: Empty Postal Code blocks proceeding
Steps: 1. Fill First Name and Last Name only / 2. Click Continue
Expected Result: Error: Postal Code is required

Title: Cancel at Step 1 returns to cart with items intact
Steps: 1. Click Cancel
Expected Result: Returns to cart - items still present

Title: Cancel at Step 2 returns to inventory
Steps: 1. Fill info and continue to Step 2 / 2. Click Cancel
Expected Result: Returns to inventory - cart items preserved

Title: Cart is empty after completing an order
Steps: 1. Click Back Home after order confirmation
Expected Result: Cart badge gone - cart page empty

Title: BUG - Checkout allowed with empty cart
Steps: 1. Go to cart with 0 items / 2. Click Checkout
Expected Result: Should show warning or block checkout - not proceed to step 1

Title: Hamburger menu displays all options
Steps: 1. Click hamburger menu icon
Expected Result: Menu shows: All Items and About and Logout and Reset App State

Title: Reset App State clears the cart
Steps: 1. Open menu / 2. Click Reset App State
Expected Result: Cart badge gone - all buttons reset to Add to cart

Title: Back to products from product detail
Steps: 1. Click Back to products
Expected Result: Returns to inventory - cart and sort preserved

Title: Footer links present on all pages
Steps: 1. Check footer on all pages
Expected Result: Twitter and Facebook and LinkedIn and Terms of Service and Privacy Policy visible

Title: problem_user - sort is broken
Steps: 1. Click sort dropdown / 2. Select Price low to high
Expected Result: Products reorder correctly by price ascending

Title: performance_glitch_user - slow page loads
Steps: 1. Navigate between pages
Expected Result: Pages load within acceptable threshold under 2s
